---
title: "ADS_503_Diabetes_EDA"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)

diabetes <- diabetic_data
```

```{r}
dim(diabetes)

names(diabetes)
```

```{r}
summary(diabetes)
```

```{r}
colSums(diabetes == "?", na.rm = TRUE)

diabetes[diabetes == "?"] <- NA
```

```{r}
#eval correlated variable
numeric_vars <- diabetes %>%
  select(where(is.numeric))

cor_matrix <- cor(numeric_vars, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
```

```{r}
table(diabetes$readmitted)

prop.table(table(diabetes$readmitted))
```

```{r}
ggplot(diabetes,
       aes(x = readmitted)) +
  geom_bar(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribution of Readmission Status",
    x = "Readmission Status",
    y = "Count"
  )
```

```{r}
# age vs readmission
ggplot(diabetes,
       aes(x = age,
           fill = readmitted)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(
    title = "Readmission Proportion by Age Group",
    x = "Age Group",
    y = "Proportion"
  )
```

```{r}
#time in hospital
ggplot(diabetes,
       aes(x = time_in_hospital)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20,
                 fill = "steelblue")
```

```{r}
# time in hospital vs readmission
ggplot(diabetes,
       aes(x = readmitted,
           y = time_in_hospital)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightblue")
```

```{r}
# number of meds vs readmission
ggplot(diabetes,
       aes(x = readmitted,
           y = number_inpatient)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightpink")
```

```{r}
# number of inpatiant visits vs readmission 
ggplot(diabetes,
       aes(x = readmitted,
           y = number_inpatient)) +
  geom_boxplot(fill = "lightpink")
```

```{r}
ggplot(diabetes,
       aes(x = time_in_hospital)) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 20,
                 fill = "steelblue")
```

```{r}
## suggestions 
# remove encounter_id and patient_nbr
 # diabetes <- diabetes %>%
  # select(-encounter_id, -patient_nbr)
# change character values to factors
# diabetes <- diabetes %>%
  # mutate(across(where(is.character), as.factor))

```
